feeds.title: GadgetGang HK
feeds.description:
動漫節「港漫動力4」參與之漫畫家 一鋒、張君豪、曹志豪、葉偉青，談何謂 #香港漫畫，大談香港漫畫發展與文化，探討 #港漫動力 對漫畫業界的影響。
當然四人會介紹自己在「#港漫動力4」推出的最新漫畫作品。
#一鋒 《BONEMAX》
#張君豪 《搜遊記》
#葉偉青 《白日夢手帳》
#曹志豪 《失敗的我被放上了置物架》

#ACGHK2025 #acghk #動漫節 #動漫節2025

00:00 何謂港漫
00:55 由傳統薄裝漫畫沒落至現今百花齊放
02:45 港漫動力 對漫畫創作者有何好處?
05:38 港漫動力門檻高嗎? 作品質素如何?
08:36 一鋒 談新作《BONEMAX》
11:05 張君豪  談新作《搜遊記》
13:54 葉偉青  談新作《白日夢手帳》
17:22 曹志豪  談新作《失敗的我被放上了置物架》
20:22 港漫動力 金錢以外的幫助
22:37 港漫動力能推動漫畫行業嗎?香港漫畫業欠缺甚麼?

feeds.title: The Mysticle
feeds.description:
In todays video our first focus is the Meta Pixel LocalHost Tracking controversy, specifically Meta's pause of Android tracking technology. This issue highlights ongoing privacy concerns related to Meta's data practices.

Further Meta-related topics include new Navigator features: the Seethrough Navigator functionality that dims the environment, and the Move With You Navigator feature. A notable point of discussion is the continued lack of support for these features on Xbox platforms.

Updates to Meta Horizon are also covered, featuring the introduction of Fish & Dog Avatars. Additionally, this report details leaks surrounding Meta Celeste, which involves future HUD glasses, their design, and associated EMG wristband and gesture technologies. The emerging Hypernova project is also addressed.

Environment leaks for Quest platforms are presented, including a Leaked Theater Environment for social VR and a New Plaza Environment. A persistent Power Menu Bug on Meta devices is also highlighted.

Broader industry discussions include the significant "Stop Killing Games" initiative, advocating against the discontinuation of video games. Finally, the video notes recent visual upgrades for Green Hell VR on Quest 3, enhancing its immersive experience.

I hope you enjoy this one :D

https://discord.gg/NUqvaCz

🎨 蘋果即將發布的新品真的是滿令人期待的！iPhone、Apple Watch、AirPods、AirTag，等待120Hz螢幕刷新率的觀眾肯定是很期待了🎉但是其他細節也值得你注意💥這期節目帶你看確定性較高的新品有哪些重點吧📺
====================


📢  25萬訂閱抽獎活動正式啟動！

🎁 獎品：全新 iPhone17（標準版）一支
📆 活動時間：即日起至「頻道達成 25 萬訂閱日止」（以美東時間為準）

📌 參加方式：
1️⃣ 訂閱我們的頻道
2️⃣ 活動期間內，在我們上線的「長影片」留言
📝 留言內容：請包含 "iPhone17"（注意大小寫，中間沒有空白！）

✅ 我們將從活動期間內的影片中，隨機選出一支影片，並從這支影片隨機抽取一位幸運觀眾！並送出 iPhone 17 ~
❤️只要你有訂閱，且留言正確，就有機會成為幸運得主！

🔥如果每支長影片都留言，抽中的機率最高。

📩 中獎後請於「一週內」將收件資訊寄至：ptsreview.cs@gmail.com
若逾期未寄出，將重新抽出幸運觀眾！

====================

章節：

feeds.title: 最新的發文 : gadgets
feeds.description: Gadgets

feeds.title: Hugh Hou
feeds.description:
Film 16K immersive 180 on location? Here’s how.

We just wrapped a 16K 90fps immersive 180 film at Santa Monica Pier using the Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive for Apple Vision Pro—powered by a Core Helix Max and mounted on a low-profile monopole to keep the 180° frame clean and stable.

The full film is now available to stream or download on my Vision Pro app, Spatial Film.

Comment “URSA Cine Immersive” and I’ll DM you the link.

If you’re working in immersive, save this post for your next on-set workflow reference—and tag a fellow filmmaker who’s exploring VR180 or thinking about picking up the URSA Cine Immersive for Vision Pro production.

#ursacineimmersive #applevisionpro
